description: Firmable is the largest AI-powered B2B database for Australia and New Zealand, with buying signals and CRM integrations.
overview: Firmable is an AI sales intelligence platform for Australia and New Zealand, combining a large local B2B database with real-time buying signals to help teams find and prioritize leads.
what_is: Firmable is an AI-driven sales intelligence platform for businesses in Australia and New Zealand. It pairs the largest local B2B database, with 1.5 million companies and 10 million contacts, with real-time buying signals so teams can find, prioritize, and close deals with locally accurate data.

It is strongest for lead generation, list building, and prospecting for sales leaders and reps, helping build lists, monitor intent, and personalize outreach. Firmable integrates with CRMs like HubSpot, Salesforce, and Microsoft Dynamics 365 Sales, and is focused on ANZ outbound rather than global markets or general marketing automation.
